TOPIC: HUMAN RIGHTS

LESSON 3: COMMUNICATION TASK

On the Peace Day celebrated every year in Cote d’Ivoire (December15), the English Club of your school

organizes an article writing competition about the conditions for reconciliation in Cote d’Ivoire. The best

article will be published in the English Club Magazine.

-Give a title to your article.

-Mention the non-respect of people’s rights and duties as the causes of troubles in the country.

-Suggest tolerance as a solution for a real reconciliation.

TROISIEME

ANGLAIS
